flags.detail: Role requires on-site presence in Herzogenaurach (near Nuremberg). Candidate is based in Lüneburg (~600 km). Cover letter does not address relocation willingness.
Match score 67 is below recommended threshold of 70. Primary gaps: Asana/Notion/Monday.com, sportswear/retail industry context.

strengths: JD 'connective tissue' language echoed precisely in CV summary and cover letter
JIRA surfaced as credible project tool substitute for Asana
SOP/process documentation placed as Bullet 1 at IPC — direct JD match
E-commerce background (Moli Media) and C-suite reporting (HSBC) both present
All figures and dates factually preserved — no fabrication
